Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Philips Azur Steam Iron
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. The intelligent temperature control guarantees no scorching, allowing you to iron both horizontally and vertically with ease. Philips Azur 8000系列蒸汽熨斗有OptimalTEMP免调校温控技术，保证不会把面料烫坏。智能温控保证不熨焦，让您水平、垂直熨烫一机搞定！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Electronic Nerve Stimulator
programme.desc: Compact & intuitive design massager that allows you to treat specific pain areas wherever you are. 微电流电疗结合热敷功能，帮助舒缓疼痛的好帮手，哪里痛就贴哪里！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus
programme.desc: Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus is a non-cook fungus, ready to eat in just one minute. It contains 100% pure natural organic white fungus with no preservatives or chemical additives added. Health+雪颜银耳 ，免煮即食只需1分钟即可享用。100% 纯天然有机银耳，不添加防腐剂或化学添加剂

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos Shuttle Chef Thermal Cooker
programme.desc: Energy-saving, no-fire thermal cooker preserves nutrients, prepare in the morning, enjoy a hot meal later 节能无火焖烧锅，保持食物营养, 早上轻松准备，晚上即可享用热食

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day. Karihome Gold 成人羊奶粉口感顺滑，富含易吸收的羊奶蛋白，采用先进脱膻技术，保留营养与纯净口感，连肠胃敏感者都能安心饮用。 还特别添加叶黄素、胶原蛋白和 Omega-3，支持眼睛、关节及心脑血管健康。每天两杯，补钙增强免疫力，适合全家饮用，特别适合年长人士，助力骨骼健康与活力。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - [24 Bottles] Kinohimitsu Bird's Nest Red Dates & Wolfberry + Bird's Nest Chinese Ginseng
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu Bird’s Nest is hand-picked and traditionally brewed to enhance beauty, boost vitality, and restore energy. The Ginseng Bird’s Nest relieves fatigue, while the Red Date & Goji Berry version promotes a radiant complexion Kinohimitsu燕窝采用纯手工挑毛与古法炖煮，营养丰富，助美容养颜、增强体质、恢复活力。长白山人参燕窝饮补气强身、缓解疲劳；红枣枸杞燕窝饮促进气血循环，令肌肤红润透亮.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness. OTO e-Physio 电波保健仪，升级版足部理疗设备，有助缓解酸痛、肿胀与麻木，同时促进血液循环。韩国制造，采用低频电波刺激肌肉，帮助带动血流。配备双通道设计，可连接贴片与腰带，实现全身使用，帮助减轻疲劳、改善循环，提升整体健康状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE Bio-Ray Plantar Fasciitis Compression Foot Sleeves
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity. 支撑足弓，稳固筋膜，有效缓解疼痛和肿胀。袜子轻轻包覆脚部肌肉和筋腱，加上日本生化能技术，促进血气循环，让脚更舒适、更快恢复。防滑、柔软透气，全天穿都舒服，不管是运动还是穿袜子都合适！

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Panama Dining Room Service Challenge
programme.desc: The challenge is off-site at Panama Dining Room, in Melbourne's inner-city suburb of Fitzroy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Peter Gilmore's Snow Egg & MasterClass 3
programme.desc: This is no ordinary elimination, but a pressure test with an iconic dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Visit from Loved Ones
programme.desc: Our 7 remaining contestants are in the MasterChef kitchen ready to fight for their place.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Cryptic Pressure Test: Joe Grbac's Imperial Mandarin
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test face elimination. Which of our contestants will be able to save their place in the competition with a pressure test like no other?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Fast-Track to Finals Immunity Challenge: Reynold Poernomo and Matt Sinclair
programme.desc: The winner of the mystery box and of the invention test will face off in round one, vying for the chance to cook off against a professional cook in round two to get fast-tracked to Finals Week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - SecondBite's Six-Course Degustation Challenge
programme.desc: This episode is all about raising money for Second Bite, a charity that the program supports. Contestants will cook using only ingredients donated by the charity, cooking a six-course degustation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Sudden Death Elimination Challenge & MasterClass
programme.desc: This is the final elimination before Finals Week, and will determine the top five for 2018.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Finals Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: Today marks the first day of Finals Week for 2018.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Ashley Palmer-Watts' Sherried Marron
programme.desc: It's the first pressure test of finals week and the bottom three contestants from the previous invention test line up for what will be the last time in the MasterChef kitchen for one of them.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Season Affinity Duel Challenge
programme.desc: We are down to the top four in the competition and they will compete for a massive advantage. Just days from the grand finale, this advantage will be a game-changer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Icebergs Dining Room Service Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants arrive in Sydney at the iconic Icebergs restaurant in Bondi. They are competing for a place in the semifinal and need to be inspired by the Italian menu at Icebergs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Elimination Challenge: World Class & MasterClass 5
programme.desc: The elimination challenge will determine who will go into the semifinal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: It's the grand finale of 2018.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Premiere
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia returns with the best group of home cooks the competition has ever seen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - 2nd Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: In the second judges' auditions our amateur cooks are given one hour to cook their best dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Final Round Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: With the Final Round of the Judge's Audition comes the First Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - First Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: 2015's Masterchef, Billie McKay, knows exactly what this crop of aspirants are going through.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - First Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Three contestants choose a cloche containing a single ingredient to be used in a dish for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge: Marco Pierre White
programme.desc: The hopeful chefs suit up and show up for Marco Pierre White Week.

programme.title: Bibik Aku Nak Kahwin
programme.desc: Milah yang terlalu berharap untuk berkahwin, akhirnya menemui jodoh secara tiba-tiba. Lakonan Didie Alias, Hairul Azreen dan Nabila AF.

programme.title: Baby-Sita
programme.desc: Two grand-theft-auto and best friends Adam & Hatim discovered a baby at the back seat of a stolen car. Keen to avoid detection, they take care of the baby while figuring out how to return the baby without getting caught

programme.title: Baby Jarum

programme.title: Diari Chinta
programme.desc: Chinta selalu gagal dalam cintanya diberikan sebuah diari ajaib untuk menulis babak cinta. Impian yang ditulis Chinta itu menjadi kenyataan dengan kemunculan Ben namun tidaklah selancar yang disangka.

programme.title: Kipas Belum Mati
programme.desc: Mia, seorang artis meningkat naik, membuka kelab peminatnya dan dibantu oleh Lynn yang menjadi pengurus. Dengan bantuan Lynn, kelabnya maju namun ada harga yang harus dibayar di sebalik kejayaan tersebut..

programme.title: Geng
programme.desc: Isabella is an ex-convict who has sworn off her life of crime. Unfortunately, her old gang boss wants her to do one last drug transaction and kidnaps her mother to blackmail Isabella. With the help of her high school best friends, Mariam and Anita, Isabella goes on a road trip to save her mother.

programme.title: Keabadian Cinta
programme.desc: 3 couples falls in love with each other in 3 different love stories.

programme.title: Boyfriend Aku Dari ...

programme.title: Gengster Leng Chai
programme.desc: Black is a failure of a gangster, being too soft hearted with people. After meeting Mawar, he is determined to change despite the objections of others.

programme.title: Strawberi Karipap Sesat Kat Paris
programme.desc: Nini and Haikal start their big adventure to find their aunty Lisa who gets a job offer as a professional photographer in Paris. Unfortunately, their journey turns upside down when they arrive in Paris and ruin a newly-wed coupleís honeymoon.

programme.title: Nota Silam
programme.desc: Munirah menjumpai sebuah nota cinta di dalam sebuah buku yang diperolehi secara rambang dari 'blind date with a book' dan cuba untuk menemukan pasangan di dalam nota tersebut yang merubah hidup Munirah

programme.title: Bukan Cerita Cinta Cliche

programme.title: Puyah & Putat
programme.desc: Kisah pengembaraan Puyah, seorang gadis kampung becok yang disukai ramai, apabila dia melawat Kuala Lumpur dan termasuk set filem secara tak sengaja, dan tak semena-mena mula mendapat nama sebagai pelakon.

programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.desc: This is a lighthearted family drama about a teenage girl who is closely guarded by her mother.

programme.desc: Husin telah menggunakan ilmu hitam iaitu dengan ‘Anak Kerak' demi untuk mendapatkan kekebalan, kesenangan dan kemewahan hidup di dunia

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Buta
programme.desc: Telefilem komedi romantik tentang perkenalan singkat di antara Zulin, seorang gadis yang tidak pernah bercinta, dengan Izlan, seorang duda dalam satu 'blind date' yang diaturkan oleh Nadya Ramanshah.

programme.title: Matahari
programme.desc: Fauzi seorang guru yang telah dihantar untuk berkhidmat di Sabah. Di sana dia telah berkenalan dengan seorang novelis yang sedang mengalami masalah ‘writer’s block’ iaitu Yazid.

programme.title: Meniti Cinta Di Starimost
programme.desc: Iman dipaksa berkahwin dengan Qaseh, anak kepada orang gajinya untuk mewarisi harta bapanya. Percutian mereka di Bosnia membuahkan bibit-bibit cinta. Lakonan Iqram Dinzly, Zarina Zainoordin dan Yana Shamsudin.

programme.title: Jula Juli Bintang Putus Cinta
programme.desc: Telemovie sekuel Jula Juli Bintang Cinta kini kembali! Kali ini, Jula dan Juli mengalami konflik percintaan dengan Dani & Izham sehingga mereka memutuskan untuk berpisah dan melarikan diri ke kampung Juli.

programme.title: Kampung Kuala Lambat
programme.desc: Kampung Kuala Lambat bagai mengalami sumpahan apabila lelaki yang berkahwin muda akan mati di hari pernikahan mereka namun kejadian ganjil ini tidak berlaku kepada lelaki yang berusia 60 tahun ke atas.

programme.title: Musnahkan Pelamin Anganku
programme.desc: Mikael yang merupakan seorang wedding planner menerima tawaran besar untuk menjayakan sebuah majlis perkahwinan pelanggannya. Namun majlis perkahwinan tersebut merupakan majlis bekas isterinya.

programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP6
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Flashpoint - Shergar/ Euro 2016 - EP10

programme.title: Fight Stars - Women's MMA - EP46
programme.desc: In this episode, the spotlight is on the women of MMA, notably those who earn astonishing salaries, while we present to you Singapore's new boxing hope and profile Dillian Whyte, for whom life has not always been easy.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Ronda Rousey - EP4
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the greatest champions of combat sports, in particular Ronda Rousey and her former training partner Kayla Harrison. Plus, discover the boxing pros who made themselves known by winning an Olympic medal.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Gina Carano - EP5
programme.desc: In Fight Stars find out about the best champions of combat sports, including the greatest Chinese boxer, Zou Shiming, Gina Carano, who reached Hollywood via UFC, star commentator Joe Rogan, and the champions who became politicians.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Jonah Lomu/ Peter Snell/ World Cup 2018 - EP17
programme.desc: Jonah Lomu changed rugby during the 1995 World Cup. Another New Zealander, Peter Snell, put his country on the map 30 years earlier. And the 2018 World Cup final gave rise to an own goal which became a masterpiece.

programme.title: Destination Qatar - Croatia - EP16
programme.desc: Croatia have a new look, but will rely on its old weapon, while the Blazers hope to surprise the world once again.

programme.title: The Iconic - Football - Luca Modric - EP23
programme.desc: Argentina - one nation, two kings. Luca Modric - the Croat hero reborn in the ashes of war.

programme.title: Top 20 - Supernatural - EP124

programme.title: Invincible - Manchester United 1999 Treble - EP10
programme.desc: In 1999, Manchester United were invincible, becoming the first English football club to win the treble, and all this in the space of 10 days.

programme.title: Foul Play - Lance Armstrong - EP11
programme.desc: Lance Armstrong was a hero to millions of people, overcoming adversity to dominate cycling, but his success was built on doping and a culture of fear.

programme.title: Star Block Workout - France - EP11
programme.desc: From London to Paris via Johannesburg, Terroll Lewis, aka Boost, covers the world to popularise his discipline, Block Workout. This former bad boy has chosen fitness to get back on the straight and narrow, founding his own discipline, which involves bodybuilding using solely the body and the urban environment.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Nadal/ Federer/ Wie - EP11
programme.desc: The 2006 French Open final between Roger and Rafa marked the beginning of a fine grand slam rivalry and the 2014 US Women's Open marked the passage to adult age of Michelle Wie.

programme.title: Invincible - Serena Williams - EP11
programme.desc: Serena Williams dominated 2015, winning three Grand Slam tournaments in that year, while carrying out a second Serena Slam.

programme.title: Foul Play - Tiger Woods - EP12

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Brazil - EP13
programme.desc: Travel from Paris to London via JoBurg and meet @mrblockworkout, ex bad boy who has created his own fitness method using only the urban environment!

programme.title: Flashpoint - Borg & Mcenroe/ Tyson & Holyfield - EP12
programme.desc: Bjorn Borg and John McEnroe have set new standards in men's tennis, while Mike Tyson and Evander Holyfield have reached new summits in heavyweight boxing. These two rivalries have created historic tensions.

programme.title: Foul Play - Seoul 1988 Men's 100M - EP13

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Brazil - EP14

programme.title: Flashpoint - Manchester United Tragedy/Beamon's Giant Leap - EP13

programme.desc: In 2022 Max Verstappen of Red Bull established a new reference point in the field of F1 excellence, by winning a record 15 races to become double world champion.

programme.title: Foul Play - Bite Nite - EP14
programme.desc: Mike Tyson gets ready for a rematch, Marvin Hagler makes a not so "marvellous" trip to Great Britain and the Irish mafia infiltrate the world of boxing.

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Brazil - EP15
programme.desc: Travel from Paris to London via JoBurg and meet @mrblockworkout, ex bad boy who has created his own fitness method using only the urban environment!

programme.title: Flashpoint - Michael Jordan/ Agnes Keliti/ India 1983 - EP14
programme.desc: Michael Jordan danced for the last time for the Chicago Bulls in 1998. Agnes Keleti dominated the Melbourne Olympic Games in 1956. And India stunned the world by carrying off the cricketing World Cup in 1983.

programme.title: Football’s Greatest Stage - The Quiet Captain - EP6
programme.desc: Until another English captain lifts the World Cup the story of Bobby Moore will only loom larger.

programme.title: Football Nation - Brazil - EP1
programme.desc: Brazil is the footballing nation par excellence.

programme.title: Football Nation - Germany - EP1
programme.desc: Germany is the footballing nation which most regularly excels.

programme.title: Football Nation - England - EP1
programme.desc: For the English, England is the cradle of football, but the men's national team only has one trophy to its credit.

programme.title: Football Nation - Portugal - EP5
programme.desc: Portugal is a historic footballing nation and now a factory for the football elite.

programme.title: Football Nation - Uruguay - EP6
programme.desc: Uruguay was the most important football nation at the beginning of the 20th century.

programme.title: Top 20 - Football Sex Scandals - EP133
programme.desc: The TOP 20 is an exclusive collation of the news and the champions causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Invincible - Novak Djokovic - EP14
programme.desc: In 2021, Novak Djokovic established four records in men's tennis and won three of the four Grand Slam tournaments.

programme.title: Foul Play - Novax Novac - EP15
programme.desc: Novak Djokovic is excluded from the 2022 Australian Open, the savage attack which scuppered the career of Monica Seles and the fall of Maria Sharapova.

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Brazil - EP16
programme.desc: Travel from Paris to London via JoBurg and meet @mrblockworkout, ex bad boy who has created his own fitness method using only the urban environment!

programme.title: Mellodees - Wheels On The Bus - EP5
programme.desc: Dee rides the school bus on his way to class. Is that Marshmello driving the bus?

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep14 - EP114
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Tibbs in Charge - EP119
programme.desc: A mystery is afoot, toys have gone missing and it's up to the Shaq Pack to figure out what happened.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep3 - EP103
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep4 - EP4
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Habits - EP109
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that habits are the result of repeating good action until it becomes part of our routine. All of our activities are very important! That's why you should give a very special place for rest, for having fun, and for sharing with your friends and family. We will also learn about the importance of punctuality!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go on an expedition to the Planet of Forgiveness and learn that forgiveness is an act of love that helps us overcome anger and misunderstandings and that when we forgive we see things with more clarity. And most importantly, when we recognize our mistakes we realize the importance of asking for forgiveness through our hearts.

programme.desc: Go on an intergalactic adventure with Dee and Teddy
